raw_text: Did anyone else hear that loud noise near 5th street? Sounded like a transformer blew.
WARNING: I just got an email from 'Bank of America' saying my account is locked and I need to click a link to verify my SSN. The email address is totally fake. Don't fall for it!
Alert: Excitel broadband just sent out a notice that their local database was breached. Change your WiFi router passwords if you use them!
